name: Gado Gado i (Mixed Vegetables with Peanut Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green Beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the peanut sauce by mixing peanut butter, garlic, brown sugar, coconut milk, lemon juice, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
3. If the sauce is too thick, add water as needed.
4. In a large pot of boiling water, cook sliced potatoes, spinach, bean sprouts, cabbage, carrots, and green beans for about 20 minutes or until tender.
5. Add sliced cucumber just before other vegetables are done (about 1 minute from the end of cooking).
6. Drain the vegetables well.
7. Arrange the cooked vegetables on a serving plate.
8. Garnish with sliced potatoes, hard-boiled eggs, sliced cucumber, onion flakes, and shrimp puffs.
9. Serve the peanut sauce on the side.
Shrimp Puffs: Traditionally made in Indonesia using tapioca flour, fish, or shrimp, and various spices. Now commonly available at local Chinese grocery stores.
